title: Invisible Economy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the underworld economy|the illicit trade of the [[Invisible Market]]}}
The "'''Invisible Economy'''" was the term given to the underworld market, free from the restrictions of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The invisible economy was composed of:

*Major underworld occupations such as [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]], [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw techs]], [[spice-jacker]]s, [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], and [[spice sifter]]s;
*Occupations such as accountants, bodyguards, professional women, and cooks that served the upper echelon
*Petty criminals seeking to emulate the upper echelon
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]] seeking to arrest the upper echelon

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
